import TemplateBuilder from '/src/components/TemplateBuilder/TemplateBuilder.tsx';

Choose a template (MAUI, ASP.NET, or Blazor WASM), pick your options, and download a complete, ready-to-build project — just like `dotnet new shiny<kind>`, but right in your browser.
